title: Soul Calibur
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone duelist with a large blade in a wind-swept stone platform before a monumental ring gate and distant ruins, holding a poised guard stance just before the duel begins.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Dreamcast aesthetic, clean futurist rendering, bright accent light, airy composition, and modern arcade clarity
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- mythic, charged, ceremonial

Composition:
- single duelist only, one readable blade, no crowd, one monumental landmark behind
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid signature swords, avoid crowd scenes, avoid franchise costumes. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid signature swords, avoid crowd scenes, avoid franchise costumes
revised_prompt: Create an original illustration reminiscent of a retro-inspired fighting game. Visualize a lone duelist, of unidentified descent, on a wind-swept stone platform before a monumental ring gate and distant ruins. The duelist holds a large blade, depicted in a poised guard stance as if a duel is about to commence. The style should embody the Dreamcast aesthetic with clean futurism, bright accent light, airy composition, and modern arcade clarity; use a limited color palette. The mood should give off a mythic, charged, and ceremonial feeling. There should only be a single duelist, one blade, with simplicity and clarity in the background. Prohibit any replication of official characters, logos, designs, game assets, and such. The image should have high clarity, strong contrast, with no text or watermark. Ensure no direct imitation of any recognized intellectual property.
